# Capacity & performance characterization

Open-model (constant arrival rate) staircase sweep across **cache {off, on} × verticles {1, 4}**. A step **passes the SLO** when achieved ≥ 99 % of target, error ≤ 0.1 %, no dropped iterations, and p99 ≤ budget (simple 50 ms, proxy 100 ms, crud 150 ms). The highest passing step = **max sustainable RPS @ SLO**.

## Capacity matrix — max sustainable RPS @ SLO

### Hot path `/webhook/:slug` (no proxy, no logging) — budget p99 ≤ 50 ms

| verticles \ cache | `off` | `on` |
|---|---:|---:|
| 1 | **5000** | **8000** |
| 4 | **8000** | **12000** |

### CRUD `/api/webhooks` (create/get/toggle/delete) — budget p99 ≤ 150 ms

| verticles \ cache | `off` | `on` |
|---|---:|---:|
| 1 | **1500** | **1500** |
| 4 | **1500** | **1500** |

## Soak (stability at ~80 % of max, simple hot path)

| config | rps | p50 | p95 | p99 | max | err % | dropped |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| cache=off v1 | 6399.82 | 0.39 | 0.52 | 1.52 | 13.97 | 0 | 0 |
| cache=off v4 | 9599.8 | 0.41 | 0.67 | 2.34 | 18.86 | 0 | 0 |
| cache=on v1 | 9599.81 | 0.24 | 0.44 | 1.85 | 10.29 | 0 | 0 |
| cache=on v4 | 15999.33 | 0.3 | 1.03 | 2.74 | 27.29 | 0 | 0 |

Memory growth start→end is in `results/capacity/stats_*_soak_*.txt`.

## Spike (2× burst above sustained, simple hot path)

| config | peak target | achieved | p99 | max | err % | dropped |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| cache=off v1 | 12800 | 7221.91 | 413.12 | 416.7 | 0 | 114719 |
| cache=off v4 | 19200 | 11267.64 | 258.62 | 2440.27 | 0.1321 | 127357 |
| cache=on v1 | 19200 | 10518.97 | 301.41 | 386.1 | 0 | 189341 |
| cache=on v4 | 32000 | 18741.62 | 197.49 | 395.11 | 0 | 249012 |
